title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-28
body: Today's moderation review addressed three high-severity reports. Two members were permanently banned: spam_wave_42 for distributing phishing links across six channels within a 20-minute window, and toxic_runner for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers. A third high-severity report against core_maintainer was reviewed and dismissed as a false positive resulting from a coordinated brigading campaign following a prior moderation decision — no action was taken against that member. All three reports are now closed. We remain committed to keeping this community safe and welcoming. If you witness rule-breaking behaviour, please use the report system. Thank you to everyone who flagged these issues.
